## Environment

- macOS version: <!-- e.g., 14.5 Sonoma, 26.0 Tahoe (run `sw_vers`) -->
- Multipaste version: <!-- menu bar 📋 → About, or grep CFBundleShortVersionString /Applications/Multipaste.app/Contents/Info.plist -->
- Install method:
  - [ ] DMG drag-and-drop
  - [ ] Homebrew (`brew install --cask NewdlDewdl/multipaste/multipaste`)
  - [ ] Source (`make install`)
- Apple Silicon or Intel: <!-- run `uname -m` — arm64 = Apple Silicon, x86_64 = Intel -->
- Other clipboard managers installed concurrently: <!-- e.g., Maccy, Paste, Pastebot, Alfred, Raycast; or "none" -->
